title: National Insurance Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: National Insurance Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
National Insurance Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!
